response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack developer with strong skills in TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, but the role requires 8 years of C++ programming as a hard minimum, and the resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015). There is also no evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform work, distributed systems at the scale implied, or formal technical leadership of cloud/DevOps engineers. The profile is a poor match for a C++-centric Cloud Compute Platform Tech Lead role.
strengths: Long tenure as senior engineer with breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Active mentor/educator via workshops, talks, and open source projects
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ minimum requirement
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure leadership
No explicit technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale distributed systems ownership
